actions.name: 未命名事件
actions.caption: 未命名事件
actions.expression:
SELECT kh.RMBkh,kh.kh_id,kh.bglyq,kh.xbdm 
FROM kh 
WHERE (kh.company_name=[费用申请.客户名称]) LIMIT 1

actions.name: 财务工厂_ButtonEdit
actions.caption: 财务工厂_ButtonEdit

fields.caption: 社会统一信用代码
fields.output: 费用申请.社会统一信用代码

actions.expression:
SELECT newcwcs.sid,
       newcwcs.company_name,
       newcwcs.bank,
       newcwcs.zh,
       newcwcs.shui
FROM newcwcs 
ORDER BY newcwcs.company_name ASC

actions.name: 厂商名称_ButtonEdit
actions.caption: 厂商名称_ButtonEdit
actions.expression:
SELECT zycs.sid,zycs.company_name,zycs.cs_id 
FROM zycs

actions.name: 事_费用申请.厂商名称
actions.caption: 事_费用申请.厂商名称
actions.expression:
SELECT zycs.sid,zycs.cs_id 
FROM zycs 
WHERE (zycs.company_name=[费用申请.厂商名称]) 
ORDER BY zycs.sid DESC LIMIT 1

actions.name: 事_费用申请.财务工厂
actions.caption: 事_费用申请.财务工厂
actions.expression:
SELECT fysq.yhzh 
FROM fysq 
WHERE (fysq.cwgc=[费用申请.财务工厂]) 
  AND (fysq.khh=[费用申请.开户银行]) LIMIT 1

actions.name: 事_费用申请.外销发票号
actions.caption: 事_费用申请.外销发票号
actions.expression:
SELECT wxht.customer,wxht.khpd,wxht.yjcq 
FROM wxht 
WHERE (wxht.order_id=[费用申请.外销发票号]) LIMIT 1

actions.name: 事_费用申请.采购合同
actions.caption: 事_费用申请.采购合同
actions.expression:
SELECT cght.sccj1,
       cght.jsfs,
       cght.khmc,
       cght.khpd,
       cght.htje,
       cght.hbdm,
       cght.wxht,
       cght.gdry,
       cght.province1
FROM cght 
WHERE (cght.hthm=[费用申请.采购合同]) LIMIT 1

actions.name: 事_费用申请.领用人员
actions.caption: 事_费用申请.领用人员
actions.expression:
SELECT ywrybiao.bm 
FROM ywrybiao 
WHERE (ywrybiao.yhm=[费用申请.领用人员]) LIMIT 1

actions.name: 事_费用申请.经办人员
actions.caption: 事_费用申请.经办人员
actions.expression:
SELECT ywrybiao.bm 
FROM ywrybiao 
WHERE (ywrybiao.yhm=[费用申请.经办人员]) LIMIT 1

actions.name: 事_费用申请.费用详情.采购合同
actions.caption: 事_费用申请.费用详情.采购合同

actions.expression:
SELECT cght.sid,
       cght.khmc,
       cght.sccj1,
       cght.gdry,
       cght.province1,
       cght.htje
FROM cght 
WHERE (cght.hthm=[费用申请.费用详情.采购合同]) 
ORDER BY cght.sid DESC LIMIT 1

actions.caption: 事_费用申请.费用详情.外销发票号

actions.expression:
SELECT wxht.customer,wxht.khpd 
FROM wxht 
WHERE (wxht.order_id=[费用申请.费用详情.外销发票号]) LIMIT 1

fields.output: 费用申请.费用详情.产品编号

actions.expression:
SELECT wxhtsheet.sid,wxhtsheet.bjhh,wxhtsheet.zwpm 
FROM wxhtsheet 
WHERE (wxhtsheet.khmc=[费用申请.客户名称]) 
  AND (replace(wxhtsheet.bjpath,'\\','\\\\') LIKE :_user_org_path_)
ORDER BY wxhtsheet.sid ASC

actions.caption: 事_费用申请.费用详情.申请人员

actions.expression:
SELECT ywrybiao.sid,ywrybiao.spbm,ywrybiao.bm,ywrybiao.fysp
FROM ywrybiao 
WHERE (ywrybiao.yhm=[费用申请.费用详情.申请人员]) 
ORDER BY ywrybiao.sid DESC LIMIT 1

actions.name: 工厂拜访
actions.caption: 工厂拜访
actions.expression:
SELECT gcbf.rid 
FROM gcbf 
WHERE (gcbf.bfdh=[费用申请.拜访单号]) 
ORDER BY gcbf.rid ASC

actions.name: 工厂开模
actions.caption: 工厂开模
actions.expression:
SELECT gckm.rid 
FROM gckm 
WHERE (gckm.cpbh=[费用申请.拜访单号]) 
ORDER BY gckm.rid ASC

actions.name: 费用申请.申请金额1
actions.caption: 费用申请.申请金额1
actions.expression: [费用申请.费用详情.申请金额]

actions.name: 费用申请.费用详情.花费金额
actions.caption: 费用申请.费用详情.花费金额
actions.expression: [费用申请.费用详情.其他费用]+[费用申请.费用详情.公交费用]+[费用申请.费用详情.出租费用]
actions.output: 费用申请.费用详情.花费金额

actions.name: 费用申请.花费金额
actions.caption: 费用申请.花费金额
actions.expression: [费用申请.费用详情.花费金额]

actions.caption: 计算-补贴天数
actions.expression: [费用申请.费用详情.补贴天数]

actions.name: 费用申请.补贴金额
actions.caption: 费用申请.补贴金额
actions.expression: [费用申请.费用详情.补贴金额]

actions.name: 费用申请.补领金额
actions.caption: 费用申请.补领金额
actions.expression: [费用申请.费用详情.补领金额]

actions.name: 费用申请.归还金额
actions.caption: 费用申请.归还金额
actions.expression: [费用申请.费用详情.归还金额]

actions.name: 费用申请.交通费用
actions.caption: 费用申请.交通费用
actions.expression: [费用申请.公交费用]+[费用申请.出租费用]+[费用申请.其他费用]

actions.name: 费用申请.出租费用
actions.caption: 费用申请.出租费用
actions.expression: [费用申请.费用详情.出租费用]

actions.name: 费用申请.其他费用
actions.caption: 费用申请.其他费用
actions.expression: [费用申请.费用详情.其他费用]

actions.name: 费用申请.公交费用
actions.caption: 费用申请.公交费用
actions.expression: [费用申请.费用详情.公交费用]

actions.name: 产品编号编辑框
actions.expression:
SELECT cghtsheet.zwpm,cghtsheet.bjhh,cghtsheet.sid
FROM cght,cghtsheet
WHERE   (cght.rid=cghtsheet.pid)
   AND  (cght.hthm=[费用申请.采购合同])
actions.caption: 产品编号编辑框

actions.name: 产品编号事件
actions.expression:
select zwpm,sort_id from (select zwpm, 1 sort_id from cjcp where cpbh=[费用申请.产品编号]
union all
select zwpm, 2 sort_id from zscp where cpbh=[费用申请.产品编号]) a order by sort_id desc limit 1
actions.caption: 产品编号事件

actions.name: 采购合同_ButtonEdit
actions.expression:
SELECT cght.hthm
FROM cght 
where (cght.xjht="新") 
and ((cght.cgsh="1") or (cght.sfhz="通过")) 
order by cght.hthm
actions.caption: 采购合同_ButtonEdit

actions.name: 外销发票号_ButtonEdit
actions.expression:
SELECT wxht.order_id
FROM wxht
WHERE wxht.customer 
like concat("%",[费用申请.客户名称],"%") 
and  permission('外销合同') 
order by wxht.order_id
actions.caption: 外销发票号_ButtonEdit
